title: Ren'mi
description: Visual novel scripting engine via Ink script
body:
Ren'mi is an engine for creating visual novels in Minecraft using the [Ink](https://github.com/inkle/ink/blob/master/Documentation/WritingWithInk.md) scripting engine. In addition to providing a means for constructing a coherent narrative, extra tools are provided to integrate stories with real gameplay, such as special effects or running commands. 

While this is intended for adventure-style maps, it is completely possible to also create Story Locii (the places where Stories are activated) to be created and edited in survival in order to write and play stories with your friends.
